member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.MobPresetServiceAdapter
member.summary: Adapter that implements using the EF Core . Returns lightweight DTOs used by core.
Adapter that implements using the EF Core . Returns lightweight DTOs used by core.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.MobPresetServiceAdapter.GetByIdAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a mob preset entity by id, or null when not found.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.MobPresetServiceAdapter.GetAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns all mob preset entities.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.MobPresetServiceAdapter.GetRandomAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Selects and returns a random , optionally excluding given preset ids.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.PlayerRepositoryAdapter
member.summary: Adapter that implements core-facing IPlayerRepository using the EF Player entity. Maps between persistent Player entity and core PlayerState.
Repository adapter that maps EF entities to core objects and persists changes from core back into the database.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.PlayerRepositoryAdapter.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.IDbContextFactory{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.AdventureContext},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.PlayerRepositoryAdapter})
member.summary: Adapter that implements core-facing IPlayerRepository using the EF Player entity. Maps between persistent Player entity and core PlayerState.
Repository adapter that maps EF entities to core objects and persists changes from core back into the database.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.PlayerRepositoryAdapter.GetByIdAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerId,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads a player by id and maps it to a . Returns null if not found.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.PlayerRepositoryAdapter.GetOrCreateAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerId,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves an existing player state or creates a new persistent player record when none exists.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.PlayerRepositoryAdapter.UpdateAsync(Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Core.GameModels.PlayerState,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Persists changes from a back to the underlying entity.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.PlayerRepositoryAdapter.GetTopPlayersByTotalLevelAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the top players ordered by the sum of their skill levels.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.PlayerRepositoryAdapter.GetTopPlayersByHighestDungeonAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the top players ordered by highest dungeon reached.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Adapters.PlayerRepositoryAdapter.GetTopPlayersByGoldAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the top players ordered by total gold.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.AdventureContext
member.summary: EF Core for the adventure application. Applies entity configurations from the data assembly.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.AdventureContext.#ctor(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.AdventureContext})
member.summary: EF Core for the adventure application. Applies entity configurations from the data assembly.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.AdventureContext.OnModelCreating(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.ModelBuilder)
member.summary: Configure the model by applying all IEntityTypeConfiguration implementations from the data assembly.
member.param: Model builder provided by EF Core.

member.summary: EF Core configuration for the entity.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Configurations.MobPresetConfiguration.Configure(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.MobPreset})
member.summary: Configure entity mapping and seed data.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Configurations.PlayerConfiguration
member.summary: EF Core configuration for the Player entity.

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Configurations.PlayerConfiguration.Configure(Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Metadata.Builders.EntityTypeBuilder{Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player})
member.summary: Configure the EF mapping for the entity including defaults, keys and indexes.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.IEntity
member.summary: Marker interface for EF entities exposing an integer Id property.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.IEntity.Id
member.summary: Primary key identifier.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.MobPreset
member.summary: Persistent entity representing a mob preset used to spawn mobs in-game.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.MobPreset.Id
member.summary: Primary key identifier.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.MobPreset.Name
member.summary: Display name of the mob preset.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.MobPreset.ImageUrl
member.summary: Optional image URL representing the mob.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.MobPreset.MinHealth
member.summary: Minimum health for randomized mob instances from this preset.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.MobPreset.MaxHealth
member.summary: Maximum health for randomized mob instances from this preset.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.MobPreset.MinAttackPower
member.summary: Minimum attack power for randomized mob instances.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.MobPreset.MaxAttackPower
member.summary: Maximum attack power for randomized mob instances.

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player
member.summary: Persistent player data stored in the database. Tracks individual skill progression and lifetime statistics. Note: Does not implement IEntity because Id is ulong (Discord user ID), not int.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for the player (Discord user ID).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.Username
member.summary: Display name of the player (updated from Discord on each login).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.AttackLevel
member.summary: Attack skill level (increases by attacking).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.AttackXp
member.summary: Total Attack XP accumulated.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.MagicLevel
member.summary: Magic skill level (increases by casting magic or healing).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.MagicXp
member.summary: Total Magic XP accumulated.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.SpeechLevel
member.summary: Speech skill level (increases by talking/diplomacy).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.SpeechXp
member.summary: Total Speech XP accumulated.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.DefenseLevel
member.summary: Defense skill level (increases by taking damage).

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.DefenseXp
member.summary: Total Defense XP accumulated.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.TotalGold
member.summary: Total gold accumulated across all sessions.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.TotalKills
member.summary: Total number of mobs killed across all sessions.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.TotalDeaths
member.summary: Total number of deaths across all sessions.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.HighestDungeonLevel
member.summary: Highest dungeon level reached in any session.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the player first joined.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.LastActiveAt
member.summary: When the player was last active in a session.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.TotalLevel
member.summary: Sum of all skill levels.

member.name: P:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.Entities.Player.CombatLevel
member.summary: Average skill level (combat level).

member.name: T:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering data-layer services into an .

member.name: M:Libertas.Discord.Adventure.Data.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAdventureDataSqlite(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.String)
member.summary: Registers data-related services for the adventure application using a SQLite provider.
member.param: The service collection to register into.
